data.title: Fix highlighting of % on scene-unique nodes
HTML5: Make locale string match other platforms
Fix crash while trying to autocomplete non-global Autoload
Brief/long description documentation comments aren't working properly
Code Autocomplete causes crash when referencing Autoload script with disabled Global Variable toggle.
【Godot 4.0【 Gridmap lose material
Updated documentation for vulkan_context.cpp
AnimatableBody Nodes doesn't rotate Player's CharacterBody Node
Some improvements to the SceneTreeTimer
Image importing no longer working
Fix grouping annotations displayed in script document
GDScript 2.0: Add back logical operations between various types
Fixed incorrect type display of void returned function in GDScript editor tooltips
For functions that set the return value to void, the return type will appear as null in the editor tooltip
Function argument's default value not display in tooltips/documents when it's Array/Dictionary
Incorrect type display of function arguments in GDScript editor tooltips
Vulkan: Specular information not baked into static lights with directional LightmapGI
Fixed incorrect type display of function arguments in GDScript editor tooltips
GDScript 2.0: Can't instance a inner class in a `class_name` script
Consistently use `double` in Slider and SpinBox

`ERROR: Condition "det == 0" is true.` is printed when CPUParticles3D has its scale set to `(0, 0, 0)`
Can't move or rotate an object whose scale is `(0, 0, 0)` using editor gizmos
Update classref documentation for AnimationPlayer
Implement `rotate_90/rotate_180` functions to `Image`
Player's "CharacterBody3D" doesn't rotate with Platforms
Implement MSAA for 2D

Implement Feature Build Profiles

Fix typo, call mesh_instance_free not mesh_free

[3.x] Fix incorrect Android scancodes

Add a syntax for documenting method parameters
Re-create mesh collider when model change
Pressing F while the mouse is in Scene Tree panel, should put the node selected in 3D view in focus / scroll to it.
Improve unary operator highlighting

Allow explicitly defining interfaces in GDScript

Revamp style for controls
area_set_monitor_callback(area: RID, callback: Callable) for bodies
Add a syntax for documenting method parameters
Re-create mesh collider when model change
Pressing F while the mouse is in Scene Tree panel, should put the node selected in 3D view in focus / scroll to it.
Improve unary operator highlighting
Add "MultiplayerPeerCustom" to allow creating High-Level Multiplayer API backends in GDScript
Allow explicitly defining interfaces in GDScript
Add a method to get the amount of video memory available on the system
Revamp style for controls
Add an elegant way to listen to property changes
Add observable properties to GDScript
Additional Name Casings
Remove SkeletonModificationStack and convert IK solvers to nodes.
"Open Documentation" should open the script documentation if applicable
Use the lookup table method to speed up math operations
Add a Window visibility toggle button to the Scene tree
Add functions for managing AutoLoads
Add a method to get the user's home directory (env `HOME`/`USERPROFILE`)
Add a connection flag to prevent firing signals from editor
Make Gridmap consist of scenes, rather than meshes
Add filter and quick navigation options to the signal connection dialog
Add an easy way to change target path in AnimationTrack
Add an editor setting to enable border-less mode
Turn Reflection Probe's Ambient Color Energy into Ambient Energy
Add a visualisation to see the current delta-angle in the 3D rotation gizmo
Change default 3D viewport grid primary stem from 8 to 10
Detect misspelled virtual overrides in scripts
Instantiate sub nodes from C++
Reload scene when importing 3d model change
Ray tracing support
Add a way to copy a property description text
Rename `@export` annotation to be less confusing
Rename the `2d` and `viewport` stretch modes to be more explicit
Networking API changes for 4.0
Change all the `Disabled` boolean properties to `Enabled`, or `Negative` boolean to `Positive` form
Reload scene when importing 3d model change
Ray tracing support
Allow setting custom unit-hints for exported variables
Increase resizing flexibility of Godot Engine Editor window(s) like in Visual Studio
Extend `Resource` ownership functionalities to `preload`s in GDScript
[Audio] Read Metadata from WAV MP3 File
Add support for horizontal scrolling in `Tree` using mouse buttons (`WHEEL_LEFT`/`WHEEL_RIGHT`)
Add a way to copy a property description text
Allow overriding a member variable's type in inherited classes
Rename `@export` annotation to be less confusing
Add property context menu to Inspector
Rename the `2d` and `viewport` stretch modes to be more explicit
Add `ok_button_text` and `cancel_button_text` properties to `ConfirmationDialog`
Networking API changes for 4.0
Change all the `Disabled` boolean properties to `Enabled`, or `Negative` boolean to `Positive` form
